name: Production-Grade ERP Controls Knowledge Pack
description: Installable knowledge pack of original, concise, governed rules and patterns that an ERP generated by LocalAIFactory must obey to be production-grade: double-entry accounting, balanced and immutable vouchers, correction-by-reversal, AR/AP control-account reconciliation, fiscal-year and period close, P&L versus Balance Sheet classification, fixed-precision money, stock-ledger quantity tracking, moving-average valuation, negative-stock guards, stock reconciliation, workflow approval state machines, maker-checker segregation of duties, approval matrices and value thresholds, append-only audit trails, role-based access control, document naming series, multi-company and multi-warehouse segregation, and tax templates. Each item is an original summary carrying an explicit applicability note, a worked example, a required limitation, a confidence level, and tags.
license: Original professional summaries of widely-established ERP and accounting control principles, authored for LocalAIFactory. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation, ERPNext/Frappe text, or any third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Principles are framed honestly with confidence levels; no certification or jurisdiction-specific compliance is asserted.
